meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Israeli settlers violently storm through occupied West Bank
items.summary: Dozens of Israeli settlers stormed a Palestinian village near Nablus during Eid al-Fitr, torching homes and vehicles.

items.title: Israel vows to escalate campaign against Hezbollah in Lebanon
items.summary: Israel says it will escalate operations against Hezbollah in Lebanon, targeting bridges over the Litani River.

items.title: Lebanon’s Aoun warns Israeli attack on bridge ‘prelude to ground invasion’
items.summary: Israeli army chief says the operation against Hezbollah "has only begun" and would be "prolonged".

items.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy urges allies to pressure Russia ahead of US talks
items.summary: With US-Ukraine talks set to resume in Florida, Volodymyr Zelenskyy warns Russia is increasing its oil revenues.

items.title: ‘We do it together, in confidence’: Netanyahu backs US strikes on Iran
items.summary: Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed to back US strikes on Iran’s power grid if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: LIVE: Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid – La Liga
items.summary: Follow the build-up, analysis and live text commentary of the Madrid derby as Real host Atletico at the Bernabeu.

items.title: ‘Risk of escalation is extremely high as Iran shows it can retaliate’
items.summary: ‘The Iranians are indeed retaliating against everything that the Israelis and Americans are hitting’

items.title: Did Israel miscalculate Iranian military capabilities?
items.summary: Iranian attacks on Arad and Dimona near Israeli nuclear site raise serious questions about Israel's defence strategy.

items.title: The Gaza Tribunal: A question of complicity
items.summary: What role has the UK played in Israel’s war on Gaza? We meet those who say it’s complicit in atrocities committed there.

items.title: Pakistan T20 cricket league to be held in empty stadiums amid oil crisis
items.summary: Pakistan Super League will be held on schedule from March 26, but without the crowds and only at two venues.

items.title: Iran claims missile attacks on key Israeli military bases
items.summary: Iran says it launched multiple ballistic missile and drone strikes, targeting bases across Israel, UAE, and Kuwait.

items.title: Moment Israeli strike hits bridge in southern Lebanon
items.summary: Video shows the moment Israeli jets strike the Qasmiyeh Bridge over the Litani River in southern Lebanon.

items.title: Iranian authorities taunt US, Israel, EU amid strikes and assassinations
items.summary: Iranians are concerned about the impact of potential attacks on power plants as the scope of US-Israel war expands.

items.title: Trump’s changing messages on Iran war: What does it say about US strategy?
items.summary: With the war in its fourth week, the Trump administration sends contradictory messages on how to proceed.

items.title: Is Greater Israel already happening on the ground?
items.summary: From a verse in the Bible, to a map, to strategy, to action, Greater Israel has stopped being just a concept.

items.title: Canada’s Supreme Court must strike down Quebec’s Bill 21
items.summary: Under the guise of preserving secularism, this law allows the exclusion of people based on their religious identity.

items.title: Puerto Rican activists bring medicine to Havana despite US blockade
items.summary: Puerto Rican activists brought suitcases filled with medicine and medical supplies to Havana despite US blockade.

items.title: Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants
items.summary: Iran warns of 'irreversibly' destroying vital infrastructure across region after Trump threatens to bomb power plants.

items.title: Hezbollah attack kills one in north Israel as assault on Lebanon continues
items.summary: Hezbollah has been launching attacks in response to US-Israel war on Iran as more Israeli troops enter southern Lebanon.

items.title: Did Iran launch missiles at US-UK base on Diego Garcia? Here’s what to know
items.summary: UK condemns what it says is Iranian attack on airbase in Indian Ocean, but Tehran denies it carried out the launches.

items.title: Moment Iranian strike hits central Tel Aviv
items.summary: Watch the moment an Iranian strike hits what appears to be a bridge in central Tel Aviv, startling pedestrians nearby.

items.title: ‘Opening Strait of Hormuz will probably require US boots on the ground’
items.summary: ‘Opening Strait of Hormuz will probably require US boots on the ground’

items.title: ‘Colonialism did its job of isolating us’ – Colombia VP
items.summary: Francia Marquez called for stronger Latin America–Africa ties to boost growth and challenge colonial legacies.

items.title: Latin American presidents criticise US actions
items.summary: Latin American leaders met at the CELAC Summit in Colombia where President Petro called for a Middle East ceasefire.

items.title: Iran war is creating ‘heightened risks of instability across countries in A
items.summary: David Owiro says that African countries are particularly vulnerable to the economic consequences of the Iran war.
